<?php declare(strict_types = 1); /* * This file is part of PharIo\Version. * * (c) Arne Blankerts <arne@blankerts.de>, Sebastian Heuer <sebastian@phpeople.de>, Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PharIo\Version; class ExactVersionConstraint extends AbstractVersionConstraint { public function complies(Version $version): bool { $other = $version->getVersionString(); if ($version->hasBuildMetaData()) { $other .= '+' . $version->getBuildMetaData()->asString(); } return $this->asString() === $other; } }
